method: per-sheet ink mask -> gap bridge -> skeleton GRAPH walk (junction to junction) -> projected through the perimeter-refit registration -> simplified
fusion: each line tagged with the other sheets that draw it within 18 m (confirmed_by / sheet_support)
caveat: tier (main road / dirt / two-track / foot trail) is NOT determined by ink colour and remains unclassified; all annotations date to the 1995 survey
